title: Connection lost error in n8n UI with Nginx Proxy Manager
symptom: Users see a 'Connection lost' message in the n8n interface, preventing workflow execution. The connection to the server appears to be lost despite successful HTTPS access.
applies_when: Using n8n behind Nginx Proxy Manager
not_this_if: WebSocket support is correctly configured in Nginx Proxy Manager
root_cause: n8n requires WebSocket support for real-time updates in the UI. If the reverse proxy (Nginx Proxy Manager) does not properly handle WebSocket connections, users will experience connection issues in the n8n interface.
fix_steps: Access the Nginx Proxy Manager dashboard
Locate the proxy host configuration for n8n
Enable WebSocket support in the settings
Save the configuration and restart the proxy
agent_instruction: Enable WebSocket support in your Nginx Proxy Manager configuration for n8n.
